task_objective: Generate a test report with 10Mx20cols where one column is all empty strings
design_decisions: Used Polars for data generation and DuckDB for profiling to handle 10M rows efficiently.
Used gc.collect() and deleted large intermediate objects to avoid OOM during generation.
Disabled parallel execution in Profiler to reduce memory overhead on a memory-constrained environment.
Used minimal=False for full profiling, which succeeded in ~40s due to built-in sampling for correlations.
results: Successfully generated 10M x 20 report. Verified 'empty_strings' column has 10M empty values and is correctly flagged as CONSTANT/EMPTY. Report located at /tmp/ibis-profiling/report_10M_empty.html
